emails.subject: United Oil & Minerals
emails.body: United Oil Minerals Russell Brad, Have you been able to get with United regarding Credit approval for a Master SWAP Agreement We have given them several quotes on a collar this past week, but can't transact until we get the contracts in place. (We need financial and physical contracts). If you haven't reached them, please let me know. The contact for credit issues is Leigh Prieto, CFO and his number is 512-328-8184. The trading contact is Doyle Valdez. Thanks.
